import React from 'react'; import { useLanguage } from '../context/LanguageContext'; import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; const Dashboard = () => { const { t } = useLanguage(); return (

{t('project_title')}

{t('marketplace')} {t('farming_help')} {t('logout')}

{t('schemes')}

View Details

{t('payments')}

Manage Payments

{t('add_crop')}

Add New Crop

{t('price_help')}

Check Prices
); }; export default Dashboard;
